title: E-Commerce Platform
shortDescription: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment integration, inventory management, and real-time order tracking.
fullDescription: A comprehensive e-commerce platform built to handle high-traffic scenarios with seamless user experience. Features include product catalog management, shopping cart, secure checkout with multiple payment gateways, order tracking, and admin dashboard for inventory management.
challenges: Handling concurrent transactions without race conditions
Optimizing database queries for large product catalogs
Implementing real-time inventory updates
Ensuring PCI compliance for payment processing
solutions: Implemented database transactions with row-level locking
Added Redis caching layer for frequently accessed data
Used WebSocket for real-time inventory synchronization
Integrated Stripe for secure payment processing

codeSnippets.title: Transaction Handling
codeSnippets.description: Ensuring data consistency during checkout process

title: Microservices API Gateway
shortDescription: Scalable API gateway with rate limiting, authentication, load balancing, and service discovery.
fullDescription: A robust API gateway serving as the entry point for a microservices architecture. Handles authentication, authorization, rate limiting, request routing, load balancing, and provides unified logging and monitoring across services.
challenges: Managing authentication across multiple microservices
Implementing effective rate limiting without Redis bottleneck
Service discovery in dynamic containerized environment
Monitoring and debugging distributed systems
solutions: Centralized JWT-based authentication with token refresh
Distributed rate limiting using Redis with sliding window
Integrated Kubernetes service discovery
Implemented distributed tracing with correlation IDs

title: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
shortDescription: Interactive dashboard with WebSocket updates, data visualization, and custom reporting features.
fullDescription: A real-time analytics platform providing live insights into business metrics. Features include customizable widgets, real-time data streaming, interactive charts, export functionality, and role-based access control.
challenges: Handling real-time data streaming at scale
Optimizing chart rendering with large datasets
Managing WebSocket connections efficiently
Aggregating data for different time periods
solutions: Implemented data aggregation pipeline with time-series optimization
Used virtual scrolling for large data tables
Connection pooling and heartbeat mechanism for WebSocket
Pre-computed aggregations stored in Redis

title: Task Automation CLI Tool
shortDescription: Command-line tool for automating repetitive development tasks with customizable workflows.
fullDescription: A powerful CLI tool that automates common development workflows including code generation, database migrations, deployment scripts, and environment management. Features interactive prompts, configuration management, and plugin system.
challenges: Making the tool intuitive for non-technical users
Handling different project structures and configurations
Ensuring cross-platform compatibility
Managing plugin dependencies
solutions: Interactive prompts with validation and defaults
Flexible configuration system with templates
Thorough testing on Windows, macOS, and Linux
Isolated plugin execution environment

title: Headless CMS for Blogs
shortDescription: Modern content management system with markdown support, media management, and REST API.
fullDescription: A lightweight, developer-friendly CMS designed specifically for blogs and content-heavy websites. Features markdown editing, media library, SEO optimization tools, multi-user support, and RESTful API for frontend integration.
challenges: Implementing efficient markdown parsing and preview
Managing media uploads and storage at scale
Building flexible content schema system
Ensuring fast API response times
solutions: Integrated marked.js with custom renderer for security
AWS S3 for scalable media storage with CDN
JSON schema-based content modeling
Aggressive caching strategy with cache invalidation
results: Used in production by multiple clients

title: Vue UI Component Library
shortDescription: Open-source collection of accessible, customizable Vue 3 components.
fullDescription: A comprehensive UI component library for Vue 3 applications built with accessibility, customization, and developer experience in mind. Includes 40+ components, comprehensive documentation, TypeScript support, and theming system.
challenges: Ensuring WCAG AA accessibility compliance
Building truly composable and reusable components
Maintaining consistent API across components
Writing comprehensive documentation
solutions: Extensive accessibility testing and ARIA attributes
Composition API with logical concerns separation
Consistent naming conventions and patterns
Interactive Storybook documentation with examples
